Iran announce withdrawal from MOU negotiations by July 31: 9% low.

Overall sentiment: Mixed? The high confidence in ceasefire suggests reduced geopolitical risk, bullish. Fed stable rates also bullish. But low probability of regime fall or invasion suggests limited downside risk. WTI moderate chance of hitting $90 suggests some upside inflation pressure. So overall maybe Bullish with reasons: high ceasefire probability, Fed likely no rate hike, moderate oil price chance.
